# AI Agent v2.0 - Advanced Intelligence

**Due Date:** 2024-03-31  
**Description:** Advanced AI agent with predictive capabilities and deep integration

## Goals
- 🎯 Implement predictive scheduling
- 🎯 Add machine learning for user preferences
- 🎯 Create multi-agent coordination
- 🎯 Add external service integrations
- 🎯 Implement advanced analytics
- 🎯 Add family-specific AI features

## Planned Features
- [ ] Predictive scheduling based on user patterns
- [ ] Machine learning for user preference learning
- [ ] Multi-agent system for complex tasks
- [ ] Google Calendar, Outlook integration
- [ ] Advanced analytics and insights
- [ ] Family-specific AI features (child activities, meal planning)
- [ ] Smart notifications and reminders
- [ ] Integration with weather and location services
- [ ] Advanced conflict resolution
- [ ] Personalized AI assistant training

## Success Criteria
- AI learns and adapts to family preferences
- Predictive features improve scheduling efficiency
- Seamless integration with external services
- Advanced analytics provide valuable insights
- Family-specific features enhance user experience
